mapper.sql: id, stock_id, name, pct_chg, create_time, update_time, subjectid, business, importance, limitUp, remark, selectedId, sort, top
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from stock
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from stock
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into stock (id, stock_id, name, pct_chg, create_time, update_time, subjectid, business, importance, limitUp, remark, selectedId, sort, top, reason ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{top,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into stock
id,
stock_id,
name,
pct_chg,
create_time,
update_time,
subjectid,
business,
importance,
limitUp,
remark,
selectedId,
sort,
top,
reason,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{top,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update stock
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stock_id = #{record.stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pct_chg = #{record.pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
subjectid = #{record.subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
business = #{record.business,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
importance = #{record.importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitUp = #{record.limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
selectedId = #{record.selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
top = #{record.top,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update stock set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_id = #{record.stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pct_chg = #{record.pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, subjectid = #{record.subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, business = #{record.business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, importance = #{record.importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUp = #{record.limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selectedId = #{record.selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, top = #{record.top,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update stock set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_id = #{record.stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pct_chg = #{record.pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, subjectid = #{record.subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, business = #{record.business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, importance = #{record.importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUp = #{record.limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selectedId = #{record.selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, top = #{record.top,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock
stock_id = #{stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pct_chg = #{pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
subjectid = #{subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
importance = #{importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
selectedId = #{selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
top = #{top,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update stock set stock_id = #{stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pct_chg = #{pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, subjectid = #{subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, importance = #{importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selectedId = #{selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, top = #{top,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update stock set stock_id = #{stockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pct_chg = #{pctChg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, subjectid = #{subjectid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, importance = #{importance,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selectedId = #{selectedid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, top = #{top,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
